events.event_description: The American consulate at Lomé was raised to Embassy status upon establishment of diplomatic relations with Togo, with Jesse M. MacKnight as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on April 27, 1960, when the American consulate at Lomé was raised to Embassy status with Jesse M. MacKnight as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
